name: The Silence of the Monster
overview: The story of a mysterious and cold key-smith He Chufeng, and a delicate and well-versed antiques appraiser Luo Bin, as they set off on a thrilling adventure in the urban city.

trailers.title: Trailer：Bi Wenjun x Zhu Zhengting | The Silence of the Monster | 孤独的野兽 | iQIYI
